data.body: TIER CORRECTION (agent-vs-single-turn). Code-grounding is the SOLE responsibility of E4/G1G2/A1 (+ G6 for mechanism-correctness); no other criterion independently greps the codebase. Reclassified G3/G4 (parent-vs-child TICKET analysis — fed as context) and T10/T11 (plan-intrinsic IaC/migration safety from ticket + best-practice knowledge; existence/convention/NIH checks defer to E4/G1G2/A1; no .tf/schema in a plan) from AGENT -> single-turn. Remaining AGENT-tier (truly probe code/external/web): G1G2, E4, A1, G6, T8, T1, T3. Same root cause as the intent-source-fidelity mis-tag: 'needs frontier model + large context' was conflated with 'needs the tool-using loop'. The bright line is captured for documentation in remediation epic 6f2d. criteria_v8.json + check_registry_coverage AGENT_TIER + three_pass CODEBASE_GROUNDED updated; guard passes.
